creator: reiko.schuh@gmx.de
text:
The soundcard, specified at the end, is not detected.  It would nbe nice,
if this will be supported in FreeBSD.  Linux (Ubuntu 6.06) has support for
this soundcard. Maybe implementation details can be used from there.

Thanks in advance,
Reiko


pcm0@pci0:27:0: class=0x040300 card=0x01cd1028 chip=0x27d88086 rev=0x01 hdr=0x00
    vendor   = 'Intel Corporation'
    device   = '82801G (ICH7 Family) High Definition Audio'
    class    = multimedia
